creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 151218
update to 0.402

The attached patch updates lang/p5-List-MoreUtils to 0.402. There have been some significant changes in the 3+ years since 0.33 came out, including a pure perl implementation and some new functions.

Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/REHSACK/List-MoreUtils-0.402/Changes
